# PR Review Template for NestJS

## Findings

- Severity: High | Medium | Low
- Area: validation | security | architecture | testing | performance | observability
- File and symbol
- Impact
- Suggested fix

## Quick Checks

- DTO validation present
- Controllers thin
- Auth and authorization guards in place
- Error handling consistent
- Tests cover changed behavior
- Logging and health impact considered

## Residual Risk

- What remains untested or uncertain
- Recommended follow-up test or refactor

## Decision

- approve
- request changes
- comment only
